headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Sysco, Raises Price Target to $88
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst John Glass   maintains Sysco (NYSE:SYY) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $84 to $88.
